skills.name: Maximum Cardinality Bipartite Matching
skills.description: Model and solve one-to-one assignment problems between two disjoint sets with preference compatibility, aiming to maximize the total number of matches.

skills.name: Binary Network Flow Routing
skills.description: Model and solve network flow problems with binary arc selection variables, enforcing flow conservation and minimizing linear costs, using either a direct solver API or a modeling framework.

skills.name: Multi-Resource Assignment Optimization
skills.description: Model and solve linear cost-minimization problems where discrete or continuous resources with capacity contributions must be assigned to tasks to meet demands, subject to supply limits.

skills.name: Quadratic Portfolio Optimization
skills.description: Formulate and solve portfolio variance minimization as a quadratic program with linear constraints, handling incomplete covariance data and verifying solution feasibility.

skills.name: MultiIndexFlowAssignmentLP
skills.description: Model and solve multi-index flow assignment problems with linear profit maximization and exact demand satisfaction using continuous variables, implemented via either direct solver APIs or algebraic modeling frameworks.

skills.name: Multi-Index Flow Allocation
skills.description: Model and solve linear profit maximization problems for allocating flows across multiple origins, types, and destinations with exact demand satisfaction.

skills.name: Multi-Commodity Flow Allocation
skills.description: Model and solve multi-source, multi-sink, multi-commodity flow problems with linear profit objectives and exact demand satisfaction using linear programming.

skills.name: Weighted Set Cover Solver
skills.description: Model and solve weighted set covering problems with binary selection variables, coverage constraints, and fixed-cost minimization using either CP-SAT or MILP frameworks.

skills.name: Cardinality-Constrained Pairwise Selection
skills.description: Model and solve combinatorial problems where exactly K elements are selected from a set, and the objective maximizes the sum of pairwise benefits between selected elements, using linearized binary variables for pairwise activation.

skills.name: Weighted Set Cover Optimization
skills.description: Model binary selection problems with coverage requirements as weighted set cover MILP, then solve with open-source solvers via Pyomo or OR-Tools.

skills.name: Multi-Commodity Resource Allocation with Shared Capacity
skills.description: Model and solve integer or linear programs for allocating multiple products across shared, capacity-constrained resources to maximize linear profit, using explicit demand limits and resource usage matrices.

skills.name: Fixed-Charge Production Planning
skills.description: Model and solve production planning problems with fixed activation costs and variable production costs using mixed-integer linear programming (MILP) with big-M constraints.

skills.name: Minimum Cost Network Flow
skills.description: Model and solve capacitated network flow problems with supply/demand nodes and linear transportation costs using structured data and solver-aware implementations.

skills.name: TransportationProblemSolver
skills.description: Model and solve balanced or capacitated transportation problems with linear costs using either direct LP solver APIs or algebraic modeling frameworks.

skills.name: Binary Selection with Knapsack Constraint
skills.description: Model and solve binary selection problems with a single capacity constraint using either a dedicated knapsack solver or a general-purpose MILP solver, ensuring robust solution extraction and verification.

skills.name: Supplier Selection with Minimum Quantity and Count
skills.description: Model and solve assignment problems with minimum quantity requirements if selected and minimum supplier count constraints using mixed-integer linear programming.

skills.name: Set Cover Cost Minimization
skills.description: Model and solve binary set cover problems with linear costs using either a direct matrix formulation or a sparse coverage mapping, and implement robust solving with verification.

skills.name: TSP-MTZ-MIP
skills.description: Model and solve the Traveling Salesperson Problem (TSP) as a Mixed-Integer Program (MIP) using binary arc selection and Miller-Tucker-Zemlin (MTZ) subtour elimination constraints, with workflows for both commercial and open-source solver backends.

skills.name: Integer Linear Programming with Multiple Knapsack Constraints
skills.description: Model and solve integer linear programs with bounded, nonnegative integer variables, a linear objective to maximize profit, and multiple linear inequality (knapsack) constraints using structured formulations and robust solver backends.

skills.name: BipartiteAssignmentFlow
skills.description: Model and solve linear bipartite assignment problems with flow quantities, demand satisfaction, and unconstrained supply to maximize total profit or minimize total cost.

skills.name: MultiCommodityFlowOptimization
skills.description: Model multi-commodity flow problems with shared arc capacities and solve them using linear programming, with robust status checking and solution validation.

skills.name: ScheduleWithPrecedenceAndDeviations
skills.description: Model and solve scheduling problems with precedence decisions, time windows, and piecewise-linear deviation penalties using MILP formulations and modern solvers.

skills.name: Binary Arc Selection with Flow Conservation
skills.description: Model and solve network optimization problems where arcs are selected via binary variables and flow conservation enforces connectivity from source to sink, minimizing total cost.

skills.name: Weighted Set Cover Optimization
skills.description: Model and solve weighted set cover problems using binary selection variables, coverage constraints, and weighted sum minimization, with implementation options for both CP-SAT and MIP solvers.

skills.name: Constrained Cardinality Assignment
skills.description: Model and solve binary assignment problems with cardinality constraints, assignment limits, conditional exclusions, and linear cost minimization using MILP solvers.

skills.name: AssignmentFlowWithParticipationRequirements
skills.description: Model and solve mixed-integer linear programs for assignment-flow problems with minimum contributor counts and conditional minimum delivery amounts, using either direct solver APIs or algebraic modeling frameworks.

skills.name: Cardinality-Constrained Pairwise Interaction Maximization
skills.description: Model and solve selection problems where exactly K items are chosen to maximize the sum of directed pairwise interaction scores between selected items, using linearized binary variables and logical constraints.

skills.name: Capacitated Facility Location MILP
skills.description: Model and solve capacitated facility location problems with fixed opening costs and linear transportation costs using mixed-integer linear programming (MILP), with robust solver integration and solution validation.

skills.name: Binary Coverage Maximization with Budget
skills.description: Model and solve binary selection problems to maximize weighted coverage subject to a budget constraint, using two-layer binary variables and activation constraints.

skills.name: Multi-Item Allocation with Capacity Constraints
skills.description: Model and solve integer linear programs for allocating items under individual demand limits and multiple linear capacity constraints to maximize linear revenue.

skills.name: MultiCommodityFlowAllocation
skills.description: Model and solve multi-source, multi-destination, multi-commodity allocation problems with exact demand satisfaction and linear profit maximization using structured LP formulations.

skills.name: MultiPeriodProductionInventoryLP
skills.description: Model and solve multi-period production-inventory problems with resource capacity constraints and sales limits using linear programming, with workflows for both direct solver APIs and algebraic modeling languages.

skills.name: MultiCommodityNetworkFlow
skills.description: Model and solve multi-commodity flow problems with shared arc capacities and commodity-specific limits, minimizing linear transportation cost.

skills.name: Generalized Bin Packing / Container Minimization
skills.description: Model and solve assignment problems where items must be assigned to containers with capacity limits, minimizing the number of containers used, using binary assignment and container usage variables.

skills.name: Multi-Period Production-Inventory Planning
skills.description: Formulate and solve multi-period production planning problems with inventory balance, capacity constraints, and terminal conditions, using both continuous and integer variable approaches.

skills.name: Weighted Set Cover Solver
skills.description: Model and solve weighted set cover problems by selecting subsets to cover all elements at minimum cost using binary variables, coverage constraints, and MIP solvers.

skills.name: Job Shop Scheduling with Disjunctive Constraints
skills.description: Model job shop scheduling problems using binary precedence variables and big-M constraints to sequence operations on shared machines, then solve via MIP with careful numerical tolerance settings and solution verification.

skills.name: Set Covering with Logical OR Constraints
skills.description: Model and solve binary selection problems where elements must be covered by at least one chosen set, minimizing total selection cost.

skills.name: TSP_MTZ_Formulation
skills.description: Model and solve the Traveling Salesperson Problem using the Miller-Tucker-Zemlin (MTZ) formulation with binary arc and integer position variables, producing exact or feasible tours via MIP/CP-SAT solvers.

skills.name: Binary Subset Selection with Pairwise Interactions
skills.description: Model and solve subset selection problems with cardinality constraints and pairwise interaction objectives using linearized binary variables.

skills.name: Multi-Commodity Transportation Network Flow
skills.description: Model and solve multi-product flow problems on capacitated networks, minimizing total transportation cost while respecting supply limits, demand requirements, and shared arc capacities.

skills.name: Capacitated Transportation Problem Solver
skills.description: Model and solve balanced capacitated transportation problems with linear costs, supply/demand equality, and per-route capacity limits using continuous flow variables.

skills.name: Generator Commitment and Dispatch
skills.description: Model and solve unit commitment problems with startup logic, capacity constraints, and cost minimization using mixed-integer linear programming.

skills.name: Integer Resource Allocation with Demand Satisfaction
skills.description: Model and solve integer linear programs for minimizing total resource usage while satisfying demand requirements and respecting individual usage limits.

skills.name: Assignment Problem with Capacity and Demand
skills.description: Model and solve linear assignment problems with resource availability, task demand, and per-assignment capacity limits using continuous variables and linear programming solvers.

skills.name: TSP with Position Variables
skills.description: Model and solve the Traveling Salesperson Problem using binary arc selection and integer position assignment variables, with explicit subtour elimination constraints, to produce a minimal-distance Hamiltonian cycle.

skills.name: Rooted Tree Optimization with Subtree Size Constraints
skills.description: Models and solves minimum-cost rooted tree problems with connectivity and subtree size limits using single-commodity flow formulations, with two solver backends (CBC and GLPK).

skills.name: Edge Traversal Minimization for Required Route Coverage
skills.description: Models and solves routing problems requiring traversal of specified edges with minimum total distance, using integer flow formulations and either constraint programming or mixed-integer programming solvers.

skills.name: Facility Location Coverage Optimizer
skills.description: Models and solves a facility location problem with mandatory coverage and premium service tiers, minimizing net cost using binary activation and coverage variables.

skills.name: Lexicographic Max-Flow Min-Cost Solver
skills.description: Models and solves a two-stage lexicographic optimization problem that first maximizes total flow from source to sink, then minimizes total cost among all maximum-flow solutions.

skills.name: Stable Matching Egalitarian Optimizer
skills.description: Builds and solves a one-to-one stable matching problem with no blocking pairs, minimizing the egalitarian score (sum of mutual preference ranks) using either constraint programming or mixed-integer linear programming.

skills.name: Maximum Weight Assignment with Capacity Constraints
skills.description: Models and solves a maximum weight assignment problem where each resource has a capacity limit on the number of incident assignments it can participate in, using either CP-SAT or MILP solvers.

skills.name: 2D Bin Packing with Disjunctive Constraints
skills.description: Models and solves 2D rectangular packing problems with non-overlap, containment, and fixed-orientation constraints, minimizing the number of sheets used via either iterative feasibility or direct MIP optimization.

skills.name: Minimum Cost Flow with Route Constraints
skills.description: Model and solve a minimum cost flow problem with flow balance, minimum flow, and capacity constraints on routes using either Pyomo or OR-Tools.

skills.name: Minimax Assignment with Absolute Difference Constraints
skills.description: Build and solve optimization models that assign integer values to entities while enforcing minimum absolute differences between pairs and minimizing the maximum assigned value.

skills.name: Multi-Commodity Flow Min-Max Utilization
skills.description: Models and solves a multi-commodity flow problem where the objective is to minimize the maximum arc utilization across the network, using either direct LP solver APIs or algebraic modeling frameworks.

skills.name: Maximum Cardinality Matching via Binary Edge Assignment
skills.description: Models and solves the maximum cardinality matching problem on a general graph using binary edge assignment variables, degree constraints, and edge set restrictions, with two distinct solver backends (CP-SAT and MILP).

skills.name: Facility Location Problem Solver
skills.description: Models and solves uncapacitated facility location problems using binary decision variables for facility opening and customer assignment, with fixed opening costs and variable assignment costs.

skills.name: Minimum Group Assignment with Conflict Separation
skills.description: Models and solves the problem of assigning items to the minimum number of groups such that conflicting pairs are never placed in the same group, using either binary assignment variables with group usage indicators or integer assignment variables with reified constraints.

skills.name: Degree-Constrained Minimum Spanning Tree via Flow-Based Connectivity
skills.description: Build and solve a degree-constrained minimum spanning tree problem using binary edge selection, single-commodity flow for connectivity, and degree constraints, with two solver workflows: one using Pyomo with HiGHS and another using OR-Tools CP-SAT.

skills.name: Resource-Constrained Assignment Problem Solver
skills.description: Models and solves assignment problems where tasks must be assigned to resources with capacity limits, minimizing total cost using either CP-SAT or MILP solvers.

skills.name: Discrete Assignment with Min-Max Objective
skills.description: Model and solve problems requiring assignment of discrete choices to entities with exactly-one and conflict-avoidance constraints, minimizing the maximum assigned value.

skills.name: Maximum Weight Subgraph with Degree Constraints
skills.description: Model and solve a maximum weight subgraph selection problem where each node has a capacity limit on the number of incident selected edges.

skills.name: Quadratic Assignment Problem Solver
skills.description: Models and solves one-to-one assignment problems with quadratic interaction costs using either MILP linearization or direct permutation enumeration.

skills.name: contiguous_interval_span_minimization
skills.description: Models and solves problems requiring assignment of contiguous intervals to entities with non-overlap and adjacency interference constraints, minimizing the overall span using MILP or constraint programming.

skills.name: Time-Constrained Routing with Binary Decisions and Arrival Time Variables
skills.description: Models and solves a single-vehicle routing problem with time windows using either a MILP formulation with MTZ constraints or a CP-SAT formulation with circuit and time propagation, minimizing total travel time.

skills.name: Single Vehicle Routing with Pickup and Delivery Precedence
skills.description: Model and solve a single-vehicle routing problem that must start and end at a depot, visit all nodes exactly once, and respect precedence constraints for pickup-delivery pairs, minimizing total travel distance.

skills.name: Assignment Problem Solver
skills.description: Models and solves one-to-one assignment problems with binary decision variables, covering both MIP and CP-SAT solver backends.

skills.name: Maximum Leaf Spanning Tree
skills.description: Models and solves the problem of finding a spanning tree that maximizes the number of leaf nodes, using either a CP-SAT or MILP solver.

skills.name: Minimum Unique Label Assignment via Graph Coloring
skills.description: Models a conflict graph where each vertex must be assigned a unique label (e.g., frequency) such that adjacent vertices receive different labels, and minimizes the total number of distinct labels used.

skills.name: Minimum Cut via Binary Partition
skills.description: Formulate and solve the minimum s-t cut problem using either a mixed-integer linear programming (MIP) approach with explicit binary partition variables or a max-flow reduction using the max-flow min-cut theorem.

skills.name: Capacitated Arc Routing Problem (CARP) Solver
skills.description: Models and solves the Capacitated Arc Routing Problem using either a MILP-based task sequencing formulation or a state-based MILP formulation, with solver-specific extraction and validation.

skills.name: Permutation Flow Shop Scheduling
skills.description: Model and solve permutation flow shop problems with makespan minimization using either CP-SAT with interval variables or MILP with position-based formulations.

skills.name: Flexible Job Shop Scheduling with Arbitrary Routing
skills.description: Model and solve flexible job shop problems where each job must visit all machines exactly once in any order, minimizing makespan using either CP-SAT with permutation variables or MILP with disjunctive constraints.

skills.name: Maximum Flow Network Solver
skills.description: A skill for modeling and solving maximum flow problems on capacitated directed networks, providing workflows for specialized graph algorithms and general linear programming formulations.

skills.name: RectangularAssignmentSkill
skills.description: Solves unbalanced assignment problems where one set must be fully matched to a subset of another set, minimizing total cost via binary linear programming or network flow.

skills.name: MaximalCoveringLocationProblem
skills.description: A skill for solving maximal covering location problems by selecting a limited number of facilities to maximize weighted coverage of demand points within a specified distance threshold.

skills.name: FlowShopScheduling
skills.description: Model and solve flow shop scheduling problems with disjunctive resources and precedence constraints to minimize makespan using either CP-SAT with interval variables or MIP with big-M disjunctive constraints.

skills.name: Flexible Job Shop Scheduling with Free Routing
skills.description: Model and solve flexible job shop problems where each job must visit all machines in any order, minimizing makespan via CP-SAT or MILP solvers.

skills.name: Contiguous Interval Packing with Non-Overlap
skills.description: Model and solve 1D contiguous interval packing problems with fixed lengths and pairwise non-overlap constraints to minimize the maximum used position.

skills.name: Min-Max Assignment Solver
skills.description: Solves one-to-one matching problems with a min-max (makespan) objective by formulating it as a Mixed-Integer Linear Program (MILP) and using a high-performance solver, with verification via feasibility checks.

skills.name: Constrained Assignment with Min-Max Objective
skills.description: Model and solve discrete assignment problems with domain restrictions, pairwise incompatibilities, and a min-max objective using either CP-SAT or MIP solvers.

skills.name: Permutation Flow Shop Scheduling
skills.description: Model and solve permutation flow shop problems with makespan minimization using either complete enumeration for small instances or MILP/CP-SAT formulations for larger ones, ensuring the same job order across all machines.

skills.name: MinimumCostCirculation
skills.description: Model and solve minimum-cost circulation problems on directed networks with flow conservation, arc bounds, and linear costs using either a direct solver API or a modeling framework.

skills.name: Multi-Machine Job Scheduling with Precedence and No-Overlap
skills.description: Model and solve scheduling problems where jobs must be processed on multiple machines in a fixed sequence, with each machine handling only one job at a time, to minimize the overall completion time (makespan).

skills.name: GeneralizedAssignmentSolver
skills.description: Solves assignment problems with capacity constraints by formulating as a Mixed-Integer Linear Program (MILP) with binary decision variables, assignment and knapsack constraints, and a linear objective, then solving with a configured MILP solver.

skills.name: Cutting Stock - Pattern-Based Integer Optimization
skills.description: Model and solve one-dimensional cutting stock problems by enumerating feasible patterns, formulating a pattern-based integer program to minimize total stock items used, and solving with a MIP solver.

skills.name: Flow Shop Scheduling with Makespan Minimization
skills.description: Model permutation flow shop problems with unary machine resources and precedence chains, then solve using either CP-SAT for exact solutions or MILP with symmetry breaking for heuristic/optimal results.

skills.name: Assignment Problem with Surplus Resources
skills.description: Model and solve rectangular assignment problems (more agents than tasks) with binary assignment variables, cardinality limits, and a linear cost minimization objective using either a direct MIP formulation or a network flow transformation.

skills.name: CapacitatedAssignmentSolver
skills.description: Solves binary assignment problems with exactly-one assignment and knapsack-style capacity constraints by formulating a Mixed-Integer Linear Program (MILP) and solving it with a configured MILP solver.

skills.name: Multi-Vehicle Routing with Optional Fleet Usage
skills.description: Formulate and solve vehicle routing problems with optional vehicle usage using binary arc variables and Miller-Tucker-Zemlin subtour elimination, producing executable routes from solver output.

skills.name: Schedule Separation with Makespan Minimization
skills.description: Model and solve scheduling problems with pairwise separation constraints and a makespan objective using integer programming techniques.

skills.name: Rural Postman Problem (RPP) Solver
skills.description: Model and solve the Rural Postman Problem (RPP) to find a minimum-cost closed tour covering a set of required edges, using either a direct MIP formulation with connectivity cuts or a matching-based reduction to an Eulerian graph.
